rds.dbproxyendpoint.tagformat.Key.Description: A value is the optional value of the tag. The string value can be 1-256 Unicode characters in length and can't be prefixed with `aws:`. The string can contain only the set of Unicode letters, digits, white-space, '_', '.', '/', '=', '+', '-' (Java regex: "^([p{L}p{Z}p{N}_.:/=+-]*)$").

rds.dbproxyendpoint.tagformat.Value.Description: Metadata assigned to a DB instance consisting of a key-value pair.
